sourceMovie.title: Interceptor
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Interceptor (2022) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: American Assassin
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Interceptor clicked for you, American Assassin (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Interceptor?
faq.answer: Try American Assassin, The Spy Who Loved Me, A View to a Kill—each shares DNA with Interceptor while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Interceptor?
faq.answer: Interceptor (2022) is best described as Action, Thriller, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Interceptor worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
